Class TreeDragDropEventArgs

Provides data for the OnDragDrop(ITree, TreeDragDropEventArgs).

Inheritance
object
EventArgs
TreeDragDropEventArgs
Inherited Members

object.ToString()

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class TreeDragDropEventArgs : EventArgs
Remarks

This event is raised when data is dropped within the bounds of the ITree control.

The subscriber is responsible for:

  • Validating the dropped Data.
  • Determining the target node using TreeHitTestData.
  • Performing the appropriate operation (Move, Copy, etc.).
  • Setting DropEffect to indicate the final result.

If DropEffect is set to None, the operation is treated as canceled.

Constructors

TreeDragDropEventArgs(IDataObject, int, TreeHitTestData, DragDropEffects, DragDropEffects)

Initializes a new instance of the TreeDragDropEventArgs class.

Parameters
Type Name Description
IDataObject data

The dropped data.
int keyState

The keyboard and mouse state.
TreeHitTestData hitTestData

Information about the drop target.
DragDropEffects allowedEffects

The operations allowed by the drag source.
DragDropEffects dropEffect

The final drop effect.
